ksa_text: Knowledge of database systems and query languages, including relational database management system principles, SQL capabilities, database theory, query optimization, and the role of database architecture in analytical performance.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AB-K-007 (Core Abilities/Knowledge) scores 0.414 composite (highest: NICE at 0.414) and is in_scope for the Data Engineer role. The KSA covers data modeling, schema design, and database work that are core Data Engineer competencies. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior IC data engineering.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: Include for edge domain (Core Abilities) at composite 0.414. Edge domain threshold is ≥0.42. Consistency check: this may fall below the applied standard.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Overturned to exclude. Edge domain inclusion requires composite ≥0.42; 0.414 is below threshold.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Core Abilities KSA (composite 0.414)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of 500+ DE job postings (2023-2025) does not surface this Core Abilities competency as a standard IC/senior IC requirement. Exclusion consistent with the role's technical focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Overturned to exclude. Edge domain inclusion requires composite ≥0.42; 0.414 is below threshold.
